usage_rules.h1: font-heading text-4xl md:text-5xl font-bold tracking-tight text-slate-900 dark:text-slate-50
usage_rules.h2: font-heading text-3xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-slate-800 dark:text-slate-100

primary.name: Emerald Growth
primary.usage: Primary Buttons, Success States, Habit Completion

secondary.name: Violet Reflection
secondary.usage: Journal Accents, AI Insights, Gradient Stops

cards.base: bg-white dark:bg-slate-900 border border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-800 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-300

buttons.primary: bg-slate-900 text-white hover:bg-slate-800 dark:bg-slate-50 dark:text-slate-900 dark:hover:bg-slate-200 shadow-lg shadow-slate-900/20 transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-slate-900 border border-slate-200 hover:bg-slate-50 dark:bg-slate-900 dark:text-slate-100 dark:border-slate-800 transition-all

inputs.base: h-12 rounded-xl border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-800 bg-slate-50/50 dark:bg-slate-900/50 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-emerald-500/20 focus:border-emerald-500 transition-all

glassmorphism.nav: bg-white/80 dark:bg-slate-950/80 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-slate-200/50 dark:border-slate-800/50

micro_interactions.habit_check: Scale up to 1.1 then back to 1.0 on click. Show confetti.

images.description: Hiker on mountain peak at sunrise - symbolizes success and journey
White paper beside coffee mug - symbolizes calm writing start

universal_guidelines: Do NOT use gradients for dark colors. Use solid slate-900 or slate-950.
Do NOT center align the entire app. Use left align for content, center only for hero text.
Use 'rounded-2xl' for containers and 'rounded-xl' for inner elements.
Ensure 2-3x padding. If you think 'p-4' is enough, use 'p-8'.
Interactive elements must have a hover state that changes color or scale.
Use data-testid attributes for all interactive elements.

instructions_to_main_agent.step_1: Update index.css with the provided fonts and color variables.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_2: Install required packages: framer-motion, lucide-react, date-fns, recharts, sonner.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_3: Customize the tailwind.config.js to extend the font families and colors.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_4: Build the Layout component with the glassmorphic sidebar/navbar.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_5: Implement the Dashboard using the Bento Grid strategy.
